data.body:
## Description

**What**: Establish the per-skill eval convention and build the orchestrator that runs promptfoo evals. Install promptfoo as an npm dev dependency, create the evals/ directory convention, build run-skill-evals.sh with Tier 1 and Tier 2 modes, configure Haiku as default grader with per-eval Sonnet override, and create one representative skill eval as proof of concept.

**Why**: This is the walking skeleton — it proves the end-to-end concept of promptfoo-based skill evaluation and establishes the interface contract that all downstream stories depend on.

**Scope**:
- IN: evals/ directory convention, run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator (both modes), promptfoo npm dependency setup (package.json, .gitignore for node_modules), grader model configuration (defaultTest.options.provider), one representative skill eval (simple skill)
- OUT: record-test-status.sh integration (separate story), CI workflow (separate story), sprint listing (separate story), remaining skill evals (separate story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a skill author can create an evals/promptfooconfig.yaml in any skill directory and run-skill-evals.sh executes it with pass/fail results using promptfoo's llm-rubric and skill-used assertions against the anthropic:claude-agent-sdk provider
  ← Satisfies: "Each skill can define evals in a co-located evals/ directory"
- When this story is complete, run-skill-evals.sh accepts changed paths (Tier 1) or discovers all configs (Tier 2), and outputs promptfoo's native JSON results
  ← Satisfies: "An orchestrator script operates in two modes"
- When this story is complete, run-skill-evals.sh exits 0 on all-pass and non-zero on any failure, with documented output format (stdout/stderr separation) so that record-test-status.sh can parse results and map them to the test-gate-status contract
  ← Satisfies: interface contract for downstream S2 integration
- When this story is complete, quality evals use Haiku as default grader (via defaultTest.options.provider) with per-eval Sonnet override
  ← Satisfies: "Quality evals use Haiku as the default grader model"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Real API cost — evals run real Claude sessions via anthropic:claude-agent-sdk provider
- [Testing] Ensure graceful failure when promptfoo is not installed (command -v npx check)
- [Maintainability] First eval sets the template pattern for all others
- [Architecture] This project has no package.json — S1 must establish npm dependency management (package.json location, node_modules in .gitignore, install instructions for CI)
